alt: Harpy eagle showing its immense bulk, robust legs, and massive talons
caption: Females are significantly larger than males and possess massive talons capable of exerting immense crushing pressure.
acquisitionNotes: Excellent detailed shot highlighting physical robustness and relative size. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/f/f8/Harpy_Eagle_%28Harpia_harpyja%29.jpg
